7 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
8 /* ElementMatrix.h (C) 2022-2025 */
9 /* */
10 /* Contains functions to compute the FEM element matrices for Poisson */
11 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
12 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
13 
14 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
26 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
27 
28 RealMatrix<3, 3> FemModulePoisson::_computeElementMatrixTria3(Cell cell)
29 {
30  Real area = ArcaneFemFunctions::MeshOperation::computeAreaTria3(cell, m_node_coord);
31 
32  Real3 dxU = ArcaneFemFunctions::FeOperation2D::computeGradientXTria3(cell, m_node_coord);
33  Real3 dyU = ArcaneFemFunctions::FeOperation2D::computeGradientYTria3(cell, m_node_coord);
34 
35  return area * (dxU ^ dxU) + area * (dyU ^ dyU);
36 }
37 
38 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
39 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
40 
41 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE RealMatrix<3, 3> _computeElementMatrixTria3Gpu(CellLocalId cell_lid, const IndexedCellNodeConnectivityView& cn_cv, const ax::VariableNodeReal3InView& in_node_coord)
42 {
43  Real area = Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu::MeshOperation::computeAreaTria3(cell_lid, cn_cv, in_node_coord);
44 
45  Real3 dxU = FemUtils::Gpu::FeOperation2D::computeGradientXTria3(cell_lid, cn_cv, in_node_coord);
46  Real3 dyU = FemUtils::Gpu::FeOperation2D::computeGradientYTria3(cell_lid, cn_cv, in_node_coord);
47 
48  return area * (dxU ^ dxU) + area * (dyU ^ dyU);
49 }
50 
51 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
52 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
53 
54 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE RealMatrix<1, 3> _computeElementVectorTria3Gpu(CellLocalId cell_lid, const IndexedCellNodeConnectivityView& cn_cv, const ax::VariableNodeReal3InView& in_node_coord, Int32 node_lid)
55 {
56  Real area = Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu::MeshOperation::computeAreaTria3(cell_lid, cn_cv, in_node_coord);
57 
58  Real3 dxU = FemUtils::Gpu::FeOperation2D::computeGradientXTria3(cell_lid, cn_cv, in_node_coord);
59  Real3 dyU = FemUtils::Gpu::FeOperation2D::computeGradientYTria3(cell_lid, cn_cv, in_node_coord);
60 
61  Real3 node_vector_integral = area * dxU[node_lid] * dxU + area * dyU[node_lid] * dyU;
62  return { node_vector_integral[0], node_vector_integral[1], node_vector_integral[2] };
63 }
64 
65 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
77 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
78 
79 RealMatrix<4, 4> FemModulePoisson::_computeElementMatrixTetra4(Cell cell)
80 {
81  Real volume = ArcaneFemFunctions::MeshOperation::computeVolumeTetra4(cell, m_node_coord);
82 
83  Real4 dxU = ArcaneFemFunctions::FeOperation3D::computeGradientXTetra4(cell, m_node_coord);
84  Real4 dyU = ArcaneFemFunctions::FeOperation3D::computeGradientYTetra4(cell, m_node_coord);
85  Real4 dzU = ArcaneFemFunctions::FeOperation3D::computeGradientZTetra4(cell, m_node_coord);
86 
87  return volume * (dxU ^ dxU) + volume * (dyU ^ dyU) + volume * (dzU ^ dzU);
88 }
89 
90 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
91 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
92 
93 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE RealMatrix<4, 4> _computeElementMatrixTetra4Gpu(CellLocalId cell_lid, const IndexedCellNodeConnectivityView& cn_cv, const ax::VariableNodeReal3InView& in_node_coord)
94 {
95  Real volume = Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu::MeshOperation::computeVolumeTetra4(cell_lid, cn_cv, in_node_coord);
96 
97  Real4 dxU = Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu::FeOperation3D::computeGradientXTetra4(cell_lid, cn_cv, in_node_coord);
98  Real4 dyU = Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu::FeOperation3D::computeGradientYTetra4(cell_lid, cn_cv, in_node_coord);
99  Real4 dzU = Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu::FeOperation3D::computeGradientZTetra4(cell_lid, cn_cv, in_node_coord);
100 
101  return volume * (dxU ^ dxU) + volume * (dyU ^ dyU) + volume * (dzU ^ dzU);
102 }
103 
104 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
105 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
106 
107 ARCCORE_HOST_DEVICE RealMatrix<1, 4> _computeElementVectorTetra4Gpu(CellLocalId cell_lid, const IndexedCellNodeConnectivityView& cn_cv, const ax::VariableNodeReal3InView& in_node_coord, Int32 node_lid)
108 {
109  Real volume = Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu::MeshOperation::computeVolumeTetra4(cell_lid, cn_cv, in_node_coord);
110 
111  Real4 dxU = Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu::FeOperation3D::computeGradientXTetra4(cell_lid, cn_cv, in_node_coord);
112  Real4 dyU = Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu::FeOperation3D::computeGradientYTetra4(cell_lid, cn_cv, in_node_coord);
113  Real4 dzU = Arcane::FemUtils::Gpu::FeOperation3D::computeGradientZTetra4(cell_lid, cn_cv, in_node_coord);
114 
115  Real4 node_vector_integral = volume * dxU[node_lid] * dxU + volume * dyU[node_lid] * dyU + volume * dzU[node_lid] * dzU;
116 
117  return { node_vector_integral[0], node_vector_integral[1], node_vector_integral[2], node_vector_integral[3] };
118 }
